properties.name: Snowshoe Mountain Resort
properties.notes: WV's largest ski resort; 4,848ft summit; 60 trails, 1,500ft vertical; year-round mountain biking, hiking, summer activities; ~15mi from Cass; Pocahontas County

properties.name: Elk River Touring Center
properties.notes: Slatyfork, Pocahontas County; XC skiing, mountain biking, fly fishing guiding; inn and cabins; on headwaters of Elk River near Snowshoe; ~2.6mi from corridor
properties.data_quality: approximate coordinates (street address: 34037 Seneca Trl, Slaty Fork WV)

properties.name: The Greenbrier Resort
properties.notes: Historic luxury resort near White Sulphur Springs; self-supplied water system (not public rec); golf, spa, casino, event facilities; potential corridor anchor at Section 4
properties.data_quality: coordinates approximate; resort grounds are in corridor

properties.name: Chestnut Ridge Regional Park
properties.notes: County-run campground/park surrounded by Coopers Rock SF and WVU Forest; full-hookup RV sites, hiking, fishing ponds; 10mi east of Morgantown; ~6mi from corridor
properties.data_quality: coordinates from WV Tourism / Monongalia County
